channel.title: Legal Tech News Feed
channel.description: The RSS Feed powering the Suffolk LIT Lab's Law + Tech News Bot.

item.title: I just learned that Trump isn’t actually competing in the mixed martial arts thing, which makes it much less interesting to me.
item.description:
I just learned that Trump isn’t actually competing in the mixed martial arts thing, which makes it much less interesting to me.

author: mattblaze@federate.social · reposts: 6 · likes: 9

item.title: Apparently the kid next door (the shitty neighbors) got a learner's permit as I just saw him "driving" her Tesla with her in the passenger seat. Actually, she backed
item.description:
Apparently the kid next door (the shitty neighbors) got a learner's permit as I just saw him "driving" her Tesla with her in the passenger seat. Actually, she backed it out of the drive (a short, straight shot, btw) then got out and in the other side while he got in to "drive."I firmly believe "driving" a Tesla should not count in learning how to drive. Bad enough one isn't forced to learn a stick but essentially just sitting on the left side (USA) teaches nothing.

author: LeslieBurns · reposts: 2 · likes: 5

item.title: * I think I’m becoming whatever the Buddhist version of a church lady is. 😜
item.description:
* I think I’m becoming whatever the Buddhist version of a church lady is. 😜

author: LeslieBurns · reposts: 2 · likes: 3

item.title: Drove to sangha, teared up during meditation (I am definitely processing some stuff), afterwards met some of the other people who are in the prison volunteer group and talked about
item.description:
Drove to sangha, teared up during meditation (I am definitely processing some stuff), afterwards met some of the other people who are in the prison volunteer group and talked about maybe teaching at the temple, too (*); then bought some champagne for the Second Fabulous Neighbor’s birthday “party” this week (and a gift card…since she’s into wine) and came home to Ruthie side-eyeing me for late afternoon treats. 😁❤️🙏

author: LeslieBurns · reposts: 2 · likes: 2

item.title: McConnell admitted to the hospital. Not dead yet…
item.description:
McConnell admitted to the hospital. Not dead yet…

author: LeslieBurns · reposts: 2 · likes: 2

item.title: #MondayRandom10 1. King Yosef – Mist of Pain2. Ted Leo – Loyal to My Sorrowful Country3. Hot Snakes – LAX4. De La Soul – Long Island Degrees5. Cult Ritual – Holiday6. Sticks and St
item.description:
#MondayRandom10 1. King Yosef – Mist of Pain2. Ted Leo – Loyal to My Sorrowful Country3. Hot Snakes – LAX4. De La Soul – Long Island Degrees5. Cult Ritual – Holiday6. Sticks and Stones – Theme Song for Nothing7. Illya Kuryaki and the Valderramas – Van A Ver8. Mi Amore – King of the Ring9. Isis – Smiles and Handshakes10. Earwig - Drag

item.title: On June 17th we're talking to soatok@furry.engineer and Equilabs founder Luísa Franco Machado about censorship and targeted surveillance facing LGBTQ+ communities. Join us and lear
item.description:
On June 17th we're talking to soatok@furry.engineer and Equilabs founder Luísa Franco Machado about censorship and targeted surveillance facing LGBTQ+ communities. Join us and learn how to push back. https://eff.org/livestream-pride

author: evacide@hachyderm.io · reposts: 3 · likes: 6

item.title: TL;DR: Relativity has acquired Gavel, a document automation company, to enhance its legal data platform by integrating AI drafting capabilities directly into Microsoft Word, transf
item.description:
TL;DR: Relativity has acquired Gavel, a document automation company, to enhance its legal data platform by integrating AI drafting capabilities directly into Microsoft Word, transforming the way lawyers create documents. https://www.lawnext.com/2026/06/relativity-acquires-document-automation-company-gavel-extending-its-legal-data-platform-into-word.html #law #tech #legaltech ⚖️ 🤖 #autosum

author: SuffolkLITLab · reposts: 2 · likes: 1

item.title: So the Knicks won the NBA Championship and the Mets just took a series from Atlanta, the team with the best record in baseball. This may mean that the Messiah's arrival is next…On
item.description:
So the Knicks won the NBA Championship and the Mets just took a series from Atlanta, the team with the best record in baseball. This may mean that the Messiah's arrival is next…On the other hand, and of perhaps more immediate import, someone forwarded me the following image.

Happy bee on the blanket flowers.

author: IcooIey@mastodon.green · reposts: 4 · likes: 0

item.title: Everyone appropriately freaked out when Trump nominated Bill Pulte for DNI, because he has no relevant experience.So Trump appointed Jay Clayton, who also has no relevant experienc
item.description:
Everyone appropriately freaked out when Trump nominated Bill Pulte for DNI, because he has no relevant experience.So Trump appointed Jay Clayton, who also has no relevant experience. Crickets.

author: jciv@mastodon.social · reposts: 3 · likes: 0

item.title: I thought I would not have any #SilentSunday experiences this weekend because I had to drive to central Connecticut. Coming from Salem, MA that really isn't a fun drive. But as
item.description:
I thought I would not have any #SilentSunday experiences this weekend because I had to drive to central Connecticut. Coming from Salem, MA that really isn't a fun drive. But as I was charging at the last service plaza on the Merritt Parkway northbound, I learned that it backs up on the entrance to Quinnipiac River State Park. Heard a downy woodpecker while I was taking these pictures. Very pleasant surprise.

author: D_J_Nathanson · reposts: 0 · likes: 3

item.title: TL;DR: Lawyers On Demand partners with Wordsmith to provide AI-driven managed services to in-house legal teams, enhancing efficiency in legal operations. https://www.artificiallawy
item.description:
TL;DR: Lawyers On Demand partners with Wordsmith to provide AI-driven managed services to in-house legal teams, enhancing efficiency in legal operations. https://www.artificiallawyer.com/2026/06/15/lod-consilio-wordsmith-link-for-managed-services/ #law #tech #legaltech ⚖️ 🤖 #autosum

author: SuffolkLITLab · reposts: 2 · likes: 0

item.title: TL;DR: Major social media companies, including Meta, YouTube, and Snapchat, argue that the UK's proposed ban on under-16s using their platforms could push teenagers to riskier
item.description:
TL;DR: Major social media companies, including Meta, YouTube, and Snapchat, argue that the UK's proposed ban on under-16s using their platforms could push teenagers to riskier alternatives as the government aims to enforce these restrictions by spring. https://www.theguardian.com/media/2026/jun/15/social-media-ban-uk-under-16-starmer #law #tech #legaltech ⚖️ 🤖 #autosum

author: SuffolkLITLab · reposts: 2 · likes: 0

item.title: TL;DR: Big Tech lobbyists are pushing for a federal AI regulation that would create a uniform set of rules nationwide, aiming to eliminate the conflicting state regulations. This c
item.description:
TL;DR: Big Tech lobbyists are pushing for a federal AI regulation that would create a uniform set of rules nationwide, aiming to eliminate the conflicting state regulations. This comprehensive legislation, known as preemption, represents their last major effort to shape the future of AI governance. https://www.theverge.com/policy/949970/ai-regulation-child-safety-kosa-congress #law #tech #legaltech ⚖️ 🤖 #autosum

author: SuffolkLITLab · reposts: 2 · likes: 0

item.title: TL;DR: The FCC's proposed rule aims to eliminate burner phones by requiring telecoms to collect extensive personal information from all phone customers, raising significant pri
item.description:
TL;DR: The FCC's proposed rule aims to eliminate burner phones by requiring telecoms to collect extensive personal information from all phone customers, raising significant privacy concerns among advocates. This measure is intended to combat scams but could drastically change how phone plans are obtained in the U.S. https://www.schneier.com/blog/archives/2026/06/the-fcc-wants-to-eliminate-burner-phones.html #law #tech #legaltech ⚖️ 🤖 #autosum

author: SuffolkLITLab · reposts: 2 · likes: 0

item.title: The @mpilhlt.bsky.social in Frankfurt seeks* one Researcher in Digital Humanities (full-time, 3 years)for the research project ‘Normative knowledge in the praxis of the Congregatio
item.description:
The @mpilhlt.bsky.social in Frankfurt seeks* one Researcher in Digital Humanities (full-time, 3 years)for the research project ‘Normative knowledge in the praxis of the Congregation of the Council. The production of normative categories and models for the post-Tridentine world’ headed by Prof. Dr. Benedetta Albani (https://www.lhlt.mpg.de/2732047/rg-albani-Normative-knowledge-in-the-praxis-of-the-Congregation-of-the-Council?c=2136899).Responsibilities include:* Developing knowledge graphs of historical data (data modelling/ontology design, query & analysis methods w/ SPARQL).* Further developing academic user interfaces (web apps w/ R/Shiny, innovative publication formats) to link knowledge graphs, transcriptions, and image/map material.Salary based on TVöD.Mobile working & flexible work hours in accordance with our works agreement are possible.Application Deadline: 07 July 2026Beginning of Contract: 01 October 2026, or as soon as possible thereafterDetails and application portal: https://www.lhlt.mpg.de/job-offers#DigitalHumanities #Job #KnowledgeGraph

author: anwagnerdreas@hcommons.social · reposts: 2 · likes: 0

item.title: Sort of relatedly, I see on some of the lawyer forums I'm on that there is some panic about the Bar starting random trust account audits. I'm like "Why should you be w
item.description:
Sort of relatedly, I see on some of the lawyer forums I'm on that there is some panic about the Bar starting random trust account audits. I'm like "Why should you be worried? If you do your 3-way reconciliations every month..."Then I realize why so many of the disciplinary actions are related to trust account mismanagement: these people don't keep up. FWIW, it is not difficult, especially with the newer tools. I use a spreadsheet for mine which makes it more complicated. Still not a thing.

author: LeslieBurns · reposts: 0 · likes: 2

item.title: Just spent close to 30 minutes chasing down 30¢ in my personal banking records, because I am that anal about money stuff.Of course, it turns out the last thing I entered I typo&#39
item.description:
Just spent close to 30 minutes chasing down 30¢ in my personal banking records, because I am that anal about money stuff.Of course, it turns out the last thing I entered I typo'ed, but it took me reading through and matching up 2 months worth of records before I could see it. Sigh. I have always been this way--when I worked at a small carryout (pre-computerized till) in college, the owner was stunned that my drawer was to-the-penny accurate, every shift.

author: nicfab@fosstodon.org · reposts: 1 · likes: 0

item.title: La governance dell'IA richiede ormai competenze giuridiche specialistiche che i ruoli professionali esistenti non bastano a coprire.Il mio nuovo articolo presenta il paper "The AI
item.description:
La governance dell'IA richiede ormai competenze giuridiche specialistiche che i ruoli professionali esistenti non bastano a coprire.Il mio nuovo articolo presenta il paper "The AI Legal Specialist", disponibile su arXiv: la regolamentazione dell'IA sta creando uno spazio professionale giuridico autonomo, distinto dal DPO, dal privacy lawyer, dal compliance officer e dalle figure generiche di AI governance.🔗 https://www.nicfab.eu/it/posts/ai-legal-specialist/#AI #AIAct #AIGovernance #AILegalSpecialist

author: nicfab@fosstodon.org · reposts: 1 · likes: 0

item.title: AI governance now requires specialized legal expertise that existing professional roles cannot fully absorb.My new article presents my paper "The AI Legal Specialist: A Juridically
item.description:
AI governance now requires specialized legal expertise that existing professional roles cannot fully absorb.My new article presents my paper "The AI Legal Specialist: A Juridically Autonomous Professional Profile for AI Governance", available on arXiv.Core thesis: AI regulation is creating an autonomous legal professional space, distinct from the DPO, privacy lawyer, compliance officer, and generic AI governance roles.🔗 https://www.nicfab.eu/en/posts/ai-legal-specialist/#AI #AIAct #AIGovernance #AILegalSpecialist

author: nicfab@fosstodon.org · reposts: 1 · likes: 0

item.title: Another guest post from Sid DeLong today. This one is about Joseph Williams' book _Style: Lessons in Clarity and Grace_, on which Sid and I both relied when teaching legal writing.
item.description:
Another guest post from Sid DeLong today. This one is about Joseph Williams' book _Style: Lessons in Clarity and Grace_, on which Sid and I both relied when teaching legal writing.#law #teaching #LegalWriting #Contracts https://www.contractsprofblog.com/2026/06/bad-judicial-writing/

item.description:

item.title: Florida man..."[allegedly] show[ed] up [at] a [3 a.m.] traffic stop and pos[ed] as a lawyer ... identified himself as the driver’s attorney, questioned officers about procedure and
item.description:
Florida man..."[allegedly] show[ed] up [at] a [3 a.m.] traffic stop and pos[ed] as a lawyer ... identified himself as the driver’s attorney, questioned officers about procedure and probable cause..."

author: jciv@mastodon.social · reposts: 1 · likes: 0

item.title: On the value of learning statistics but not learning the value of opportunity cost (of time):"A DC lawyer beat a speed-camera ticket after a three-year fight through multiple appea
item.description:
On the value of learning statistics but not learning the value of opportunity cost (of time):"A DC lawyer beat a speed-camera ticket after a three-year fight through multiple appeals. Matt Ricciardi persuaded the DC Court of Appeals to throw out his $100 citation after arguing the city could not prove his exact speed with enough certainty because of the camera’s stated margin of error."

author: jciv@mastodon.social · reposts: 1 · likes: 0

item.title: Well today I learned two things: 1. The best burner on the stove at the new house to make rice on. 2. The burner not to use at the new house when making three cup chicken. (Unless
item.description:
Well today I learned two things: 1. The best burner on the stove at the new house to make rice on. 2. The burner not to use at the new house when making three cup chicken. (Unless you want burned stuff.)

author: alysondecker@mstdn.social · reposts: 1 · likes: 0

item.title: 😆 Just unpacked the box of stuff we decided not to hang up at our last apartment and looks like some of this stuff is going to find its way to good will or storage again.
item.description:

author: alysondecker@mstdn.social · reposts: 1 · likes: 0

item.title: Today’s adulting projects included cleaning the oven door. I think someone ran a self-cleaning cycle as part of the seller’s deep clean and the result was a relatively clean oven,
item.description:
Today’s adulting projects included cleaning the oven door. I think someone ran a self-cleaning cycle as part of the seller’s deep clean and the result was a relatively clean oven, destroyed oven racks, and a baked on grease layer that meant you couldn’t see through the glass door. Now it’s useable- once the new racks arrive.

author: alysondecker@mstdn.social · reposts: 1 · likes: 0

item.title: Visiblement pour apprendre à construire un robot, il faut être équipé d’un penis… Assez choquée par cette campagne publicitaire. Rien n’explique dans le foyer pourquoi ce doit être
item.description:
Visiblement pour apprendre à construire un robot, il faut être équipé d’un penis… Assez choquée par cette campagne publicitaire. Rien n’explique dans le foyer pourquoi ce doit être un « fils » et pas une « fille » ou un « enfant ». #sexisme #womeninstemnotfound

author: SuVergnolle@eupolicy.social · reposts: 1 · likes: 0

item.title: Remember folks: Today is tax day - the day to pay your quarterly estimated taxes.I did, I paid.And I remembered how the R-party President and the R-party Congress are essentially g
item.description:
Remember folks: Today is tax day - the day to pay your quarterly estimated taxes.I did, I paid.And I remembered how the R-party President and the R-party Congress are essentially giving my tax money to Trump and his klan.

author: karlauerbach@sfba.social · reposts: 1 · likes: 0

item.title: We've got a Tesla problem ... The silly car sometimes go mad and starts blasting its horn. We've gotten the "full power down then reboot cycle" procedure down to an art.The present
item.description:
We've got a Tesla problem ... The silly car sometimes go mad and starts blasting its horn. We've gotten the "full power down then reboot cycle" procedure down to an art.The present theory is that the car somehow gets it into its silly little mind that someone is stealing it despite the presence of the iPhone app and one of Tesla's card keys.Anybody heard of similar issues with Teslas?

author: karlauerbach@sfba.social · reposts: 1 · likes: 0

item.title: Bonus points: holy hell the squealing noise as she backed it out! That POS has issues. I thought it was brake noise at first but I think it has something to do with reversing.😱
item.description:

item.title: People who know me know I'm an excellent cook. From Italian to Ethiopian to Chinese, I got game. But I also have way too many kitchen pots and pans for my pot rack. So I ended up h
item.description:
People who know me know I'm an excellent cook. From Italian to Ethiopian to Chinese, I got game. But I also have way too many kitchen pots and pans for my pot rack. So I ended up having store some of my pans in my own bedroom. Now I have a wok in closet.

author: mattblaze@federate.social · reposts: 1 · likes: 1

item.title: Poof! It’s Gone. Maybe.We think Donald Trump's name has been removed from the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts. At least, that what Trump's handpicked board of d
item.description:
Poof! It’s Gone. Maybe.We think Donald Trump's name has been removed from the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts. At least, that what Trump's handpicked board of directors told the District Court for the District of Columbia in a filing on Saturday. The removal had been ordered by the court two weeks earlier in a decision enforcing the Center’s original statutory name.http://blog.scottgurvey.com/2026/06/13/poof-its-gone-maybe/

author: sgurvey@journa.host · reposts: 0 · likes: 0

item.title: Trump's Name Removed From Kennedy Center Building Amid Court OrderAs lawyers, we often focus on the high-profile cases that make headlines, but there are frequently more nuance

author: fgbjr@indieweb.social · reposts: 0 · likes: 0

item.title: Over forty years ago, I shifted from the left hand to the right for writing kanji. In subsequent years I developed a tremor in the left hand that made writing impossible, and even
item.description:
Over forty years ago, I shifted from the left hand to the right for writing kanji. In subsequent years I developed a tremor in the left hand that made writing impossible, and even wielding a fork or spoon an enterprise to be undertaken with a degree of caution. It's not Parkinson's, but seems to be a genetic inclination to dystonia inherited from my father. So I'd shifted to printing even English right-handed. Yesterday I had a go at cursive. 👍 (Sorry, young ones, this is normal for the olds.)

author: fgbjr@indieweb.social · reposts: 0 · likes: 0

item.title: Has Hurricane Electric's DNS service (the user facing side) gone bad? I can't get logged in in order to update some resource records.

author: karlauerbach@sfba.social · reposts: 0 · likes: 0

item.title: I grew up in Southern California - so the concept of continuously free flowing fresh water all year was a thing of hard-to-believe imagination.All these decades later, now that I l
item.description:
I grew up in Southern California - so the concept of continuously free flowing fresh water all year was a thing of hard-to-believe imagination.All these decades later, now that I live in the mountains around the Monterey Bay, I look with daily amazement at at the ever-running stream that runs past my garden.I kinda wonder whether climate change will cause my stream to dry up or become larger.I'm glad my house is roughly 40 to 60 feet above (and well back from) the creek - two years ago I had a picnic along the Guadalupe River near Comfort, Texas. Nice small stream - I had no idea that it could become the torrent that it did become.

author: karlauerbach@sfba.social · reposts: 0 · likes: 0

item.title: Interesting reflection on the source of this quote:"If you think technology will solve your problem, you don’t understand your problem and you don’t understand technology."https://
item.description:
Interesting reflection on the source of this quote:"If you think technology will solve your problem, you don’t understand your problem and you don’t understand technology."https://www.schneier.com/blog/archives/2026/05/laurie-anderson-is-quoting-me.htmlIt's either Roger Needham, Butler Lampson or Robert Morris.

item.title: The kids’ social media ban gets the headlines, but my post argues Bill C-34’s most consequential element may be the Commission, a super-regulator overseeing the system with its own
item.description:
The kids’ social media ban gets the headlines, but my post argues Bill C-34’s most consequential element may be the Commission, a super-regulator overseeing the system with its own rules of evidence, potentially secret hearings, and wide-ranging powers.https://www.michaelgeist.ca/2026/06/thecommission/

author: mgeist@mas.to · reposts: 0 · likes: 0

item.title: The government is tabling privacy reform today. That’s overdue, but its privacy track record is terrible: mandated age verification for millions, mandatory metadata retention, weak
item.description:
The government is tabling privacy reform today. That’s overdue, but its privacy track record is terrible: mandated age verification for millions, mandatory metadata retention, weaker privacy rules for political parties, and sidelining the Privacy Commish.https://www.michaelgeist.ca/2026/06/privacy-as-a-fundamental-right-the-governments-terrible-privacy-track-record-suggests-virtue-signalling-over-a-genuine-commitment/

item.title: “Iranian negotiators will now travel to Doha to try to work out some of the shaky implementation aspects of the deal before a signing ceremony on Friday in Geneva – the city US neg
item.description:
“Iranian negotiators will now travel to Doha to try to work out some of the shaky implementation aspects of the deal before a signing ceremony on Friday in Geneva – the city US negotiators left on 28 February, the day the war began, when a far superior nuclear offer to now was being offered by the Iranians.” https://www.theguardian.com/world/2026/jun/15/analysis-us-iran-peace-deal-shipping-sanctions-relief-nuclear-talks-ballistic-missiles

item.title: On Friday, Anthropic received a letter from the Trump administration ordering the company to suspend all access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models for foreign nationals. Alan Ro
item.description:
On Friday, Anthropic received a letter from the Trump administration ordering the company to suspend all access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models for foreign nationals. Alan Rozenshtein explains the likely legal authority behind these export controls. https://www.lawfaremedia.org/article/a-kill-switch-for-frontier-ai

item.title: When National Guard personnel are acting under state authority, they are left without a clear statutory basis to respond to unmanned aircraft system threats within the homeland des
item.description:
When National Guard personnel are acting under state authority, they are left without a clear statutory basis to respond to unmanned aircraft system threats within the homeland despite being often being the first on the scene, writes Philip W. Rohlfing. https://www.lawfaremedia.org/article/closing-the-title-32-gap-in-domestic-counter-uas-authority

item.title: CDC's remaining workers are worried and burnt out. In a new survey, nearly all said recent cuts have weakened the agency's capacity to respond to public health emergencies.https://
item.description:
CDC's remaining workers are worried and burnt out. In a new survey, nearly all said recent cuts have weakened the agency's capacity to respond to public health emergencies.https://theconversation.com/how-cuts-to-cdc-are-dismantling-its-capacity-to-protect-americans-health-284280

author: TheConversationUS@newsie.social · reposts: 1 · likes: 0

item.title: London's "Thin House" looks as if it belongs in a Potemkin village or as a background facade on a Hollywood studio lot, but it's something of a Tardis, larger on the inside than it
item.description:
London's "Thin House" looks as if it belongs in a Potemkin village or as a background facade on a Hollywood studio lot, but it's something of a Tardis, larger on the inside than it appears on the outside. Created to make way for the tracks of the Metropolitan Railway (now the District and Circle lines) behind it, its triangular footprint gives it the illusion of being little more than a shallow rectangle when viewed from the street.

author: mattblaze@federate.social · reposts: 1 · likes: 0

item.title: Presumably Mastodon is not on the under-16 ban for if someone can work out how to set up a Mastodon account, they also would easily be able to circumvent any security settings.
item.description:
Presumably Mastodon is not on the under-16 ban for if someone can work out how to set up a Mastodon account, they also would easily be able to circumvent any security settings.
